x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that receives the bill and is responsible for making payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or organization that issues the bill for goods or services provided.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that facilitates payments, processes billing transactions, or manages direct debit/standing orders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee billing practices, ensuring fairness, transparency, and compliance with laws.
